title: Hyperspace Roamer
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Hyperspace_Roamer.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Hyperspace Roamer''.]]

'''''Hyperspace Roamer''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] bringing [[X-1 Viper]] [[Battle droid/Legends|war droids]] in to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. It landed at Bay 327 of [[Port Tower Tarkin-12]].

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]
*[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] {{1st}}
